risks.mitigation: flatted@3.4.1 installed; overrides pin in package.json; npm audit fix blocked by unrelated EBADPLATFORM conflict

risks.description: G7 mutation score below 80% HIGH threshold (was 55.9% overall)
risks.mitigation: Comprehensive mutation-killing test suite added. Score reached 81.23% (HIGH threshold). 275 tests covering boundary-value, Math.min/max, regex anchor, repair policy, entity extraction, window mismatch, and score arithmetic mutants.
Container orchestration health checks configured at Cloud Run level

risks.description: SHARE_TOKEN_SECRET not set in deployed Cloud Run service
risks.mitigation: Logged via production guard; operators must set env var before production use
risks.action_required: Set SHARE_TOKEN_SECRET in Cloud Run environment

risks.description: SESSION_SIGNING_SECRET not set in deployed Cloud Run service
risks.mitigation: DEFAULT_SESSION returned for missing/invalid cookies; acceptable for demo
